faq.question: What bitrate should I use for 1080p60?
faq.answer: 6000-9000 Kbps depending on platform and upload speed.

faq.question: Is NVENC better than x264?
faq.answer: Modern NVIDIA NVENC provides excellent quality while using far less CPU.

faq.question: Can I stream with 10 Mbps upload?
faq.answer: Yes. 1080p60 streaming is possible while leaving some upload speed unused.

faq.question: Does AV1 look better?
faq.answer: Yes. AV1 provides the best compression efficiency among current streaming codecs.

faq.question: How much upload speed should I reserve?
faq.answer: Keep at least 20-30% of your upload bandwidth free.
